Petition To Determine Heirship
Off Calendar Dec-17-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Owens for Petitioner.

Mr. Owens stated that he read the Examiner's notes, that he filed a declaration on December 10th, that the Father predeceased the Decedent and that the Mother being alive was irrelevent. In addition, he stated that the death certificate and the veterans' documents showed the same date, and that the petition was verified. The Court directed Mr. Owens to file the declaration again. The matter will be deemed under submission when the declaration is filed.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
